name: Siren Features
summary: Ability Score Increase.Your Charisma score increases by 2.
bonuses: Ability Score Increase.Your Charisma score increases by 2.
Alignment.Most sirens lean toward chaotic alignment, cherishing the freedom and independence that comes from joining a pirate crew.
Size.Sirens stand about 5 to 6 feet tall, but their bodies are slender and their bones partially hollow to facilitate their flight. Your size is Medium.
Speed.Your base walking speed is 25 feet.
Siren’s Song.You know theFriendscantrip and can cast it without material components.

traits.name: Alignment
traits.summary: Most sirens lean toward chaotic alignment, cherishing the freedom and independence that comes from joining a pirate crew.

traits.name: Flight
traits.summary: You have a flying speed of 30 feet. You can’t use your flying speed while you wear medium or heavy armor. (If your campaign uses the variant rule for encumbrance, you can’t use your flying speed if you are encumbered.)

traits.name: Siren’s Song
traits.summary: You know theFriendscantrip and can cast it without material components.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Sirens stand about 5 to 6 feet tall, but their bodies are slender and their bones partially hollow to facilitate their flight. Your size is Medium.

stats.label: Speed
stats.value: Your base walking speed is 25 feet.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common (if it exists in your campaign) and Siren.
